structuralHomes.definition: Primary source or implementation home for shipped or executed code.
Application composition or framework-level app home for route, layout, host, or entry structures.
Quality-support home for tests, fixtures, mocks, benchmarks, or validation artifacts.
Tooling automation home for scripts, CLIs, migrations, codegen, or repository tasks.
Structured payload, registry-data, fixture-data, or reusable data home.
Operations, infrastructure, deployment, monitoring, or CI/CD home.
Static asset or shipped resource home.
Machine-generated output home where generated status is structurally important.
Third-party, vendored, or externally maintained material home.
Demo, tutorial, sample, or demonstrative material home.
Prototype, spike, playground, or relaxed-rule exploratory home.
Compatibility, shim, adapter, or transition-support home.
